dependencies.rationale: Release 3.0 integration posture precedes Release 4.0 scope planning.
Release 4.0 scope planning precedes fielding readiness.
Authorization package assembly precedes the accepted ATO review fact.
Contract option years are sequenced for demo readability.
Contract option years are sequenced for demo readability.
Final exercised option precedes the period-of-performance end marker.
Implemented controls are needed before integrated ATO testing.
A validation environment is needed before integrated ATO testing.
Integrated test results feed the security assessment.
Assessment results support authorization package assembly.
The authorization package precedes the accepted ATO review fact.
ATO posture gates Release 4.0 fielding readiness.
Performance evidence supports the written option determination.
Funding availability supports the written option determination.
The written determination precedes the exercised Year 4 option fact.
The monthly IMS drop feeds the PM decision packet.
ATO package evidence feeds the PM decision packet.
The accepted ATO review starts continuous monitoring handoff.
